output.final_deliverable: The capital city of Australia is Canberra. Source: https://www.nca.gov.au/education/canberras-history/canberra-seat-government
output.action_summary: I used the merged results provided. The National Capital Authority page titled “Canberra, the Seat of Government” (https://www.nca.gov.au/education/canberras-history/canberra-seat-government) explicitly identifies Canberra as Australia’s seat of government, so I cited that as the authoritative source. Note: the merged visit to the CIA World Factbook (https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/australia/) returned a sitemap page in the provided content rather than the ‘Capital’ field, and the Britannica visit (https://www.britannica.com/place/Canberra) in the merged results did not include the article’s opening sentence in the provided content; those pages therefore did not supply extractable capital-field text in the merged results.

results.title: Canberra, the Seat of Government | National Capital Authority
results.description: As the centre of national politics, ... and the Returned & Services League. Canberra is not only the national capital but, as the Australian Capital Territory (ACT), it is a self-governing city-state of more than 300 000 citizens....

results.title: Australian Capital Territory (Canberra) | Study Australia
results.description: As Australia's capital, Canberra boasts some of the country’s preeminent educational and cultural institutions.

results.title: Founding of Canberra | National Museum of Australia
results.description: On 12 March 1913 the Governor-General’s wife, Lady Denman, announced that Canberra was the name of Australia’s new national capital.

results.title: History of the National Capital | National Capital Authority
results.description: 1 January 1901: Commonwealth of Australia is declared. Section 125 of the new Australian Constitution states that the Seat of Government will 'be in the State of New South Wales, and be distant not less than one hundred miles from Sydney'. February 1902: First of several tours by Members of the House of Representatives and Senators of potential sites for the Federal Capital and Federal Capital Territory (now the National Capital and Australian Capital Territory or A.C.T).

results.title: National Capital Authority
results.description: Canberra, Australia’s National Capital, has a unique purpose, setting, character and symbolism, and it’s important we make sure it continues to do so.
